Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-22702 affecting package python-virtualenv for versions less than 20.36.1-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-22702 affecting package python-virtualenv for versions less than 20.36.1-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package python-virtualenv is earlier than 20.36.1-1, affected by CVE-2026-22702
